case_title: LILY DAO VS. RICHARD SANG CHOO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 A 10TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY SERVED APR-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHOO, RICHARD SANG
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY SERVED APR-26-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $43.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, LILY
